(define (minimax board player)
  (cond ((winner? board 'X) 1)
        ((winner? board 'O) -1)
        ((full? board) 0)

                (op (if (eq? player 'X) max min))

              (map (lambda (m)
                     (minimax (play board m player) next))
                   moves))))))
```

Two dice. Roll — if it's 7 or 11, win. 2, 3, or 12, lose. Otherwise that number is your 'point' — keep rolling until you hit it (win) or 7 (lose).

```motoi
(define (roll) (+ 1 (random 6)))
(define (throw) (+ (roll) (roll)))
(define (craps)
  (let ((first (throw)))
    (cond ((or (= first 7) (= first 11)) 'win)
          ((memv first '(2 3 12)) 'lose)
          (else (point-round first)))))
```

  (if (or (zero? depth) (too-small? room))
      (list room)
      (let-values (((a b) (bisect room)))

                (split-room b (- depth 1))))))

Classic. Recursion with alternating max/min.

```motoi
(define (minimax board player)
  (cond ((winner? board 'X) 1)
        ((winner? board 'O) -1)
        ((full? board) 0)
        (else
          (let ((moves (empty-squares board))
                (op (if (eq? player 'X) max min))
                (next (if (eq? player 'X) 'O 'X)))
            (apply op
              (map (lambda (m)
                     (minimax (play board m player) next))
                   moves))))))
```

(define snake '((10 5) (9 5) (8 5)))
